_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: Using the Flye assembler, we generated a draft WMS TM assembly consisting of 1,215 contigs exhibiting a mean coverage of 17X.
details: Generated draft WMS TM assembly consisting of 1,215 contigs with mean coverage of 17X from 48 Gb input achieving ~20X coverage
